name: cyferlawyn-commitcraft
description: AI-generated conventional commit messages. Entirely on-device. No API keys. No code leaves your machine.

commitcraft.modelPath.description: Override the default model cache path. Leave empty to use the default (~/.commitcraft/models/).

commitcraft.modelUrl.description: Override the model download URL. Leave empty to use the default Hugging Face URL.

commitcraft.inferenceTimeout.description: Maximum seconds to wait for inference before timing out.

commitcraft.maxDiffTokens.description: Maximum number of tokens of diff to pass to the model. Larger diffs are truncated.

commitcraft.generateBody.description: Generate a commit body paragraph in addition to the subject line.

scripts.package:win32-x64: npm run build && vsce package --target win32-x64 --ignoreFile .vscodeignore.win32-x64
scripts.package:darwin-arm64: npm run build && vsce package --target darwin-arm64 --ignoreFile .vscodeignore.darwin-arm64
scripts.package:darwin-x64: npm run build && vsce package --target darwin-x64 --ignoreFile .vscodeignore.darwin-x64
scripts.package:linux-x64: npm run build && vsce package --target linux-x64 --ignoreFile .vscodeignore.linux-x64
scripts.package:all: npm run package:win32-x64 && npm run package:darwin-arm64 && npm run package:darwin-x64 && npm run package:linux-x64
